AUTO TOUR CREATION.THIS IS A PAID FEATURE: This tool is a paid add-on feature. If you would like to add it to your existing contract or have any questions, please feel free to contact us.
AUTO TOUR CREATION.BANNER: You are authorized to use "Automatic Tour Creation." Order now

AUTOMATIC.CHANGES IN TOUR ORDER PROCESS: Changes in the tour order process for automatic tour creation
AUTOMATIC.DO NOT SHOW AGAIN: Do not show this message again
AUTOMATIC.HEADLINE: Automatic Tour Creation
AUTOMATIC.DISABLED: Tour is already being created automatically.

TESTIMONIAL.HEADLINE: We create the tours for you!
TESTIMONIAL.LABEL: Info
TESTIMONIAL.QUOTE:
The virtual property viewing from Ogulo is an integral part of the digital object marketing of Postbank Immobilien. The "Automatic Tour Creation" is particularly interesting for us.

With Ogulo's central creation of the 360° tour, our agents only have to take the pictures and submit a technical order with support. Everything else is taken care of by Ogulo.

This way, our agents have more time for the essentials: getting new brokerage orders and marketing properties.

ORDER OVERVIEW.COMMENT ERROR: Your comment should be less than 1000 characters.
ORDER OVERVIEW.LABEL: Order Overview

CONFIRMATION.DESCRIPTION: We have sent you a confirmation email. Please check your inbox.
CONFIRMATION.HEADLINE: Thank you for your order
CONFIRMATION.LABEL: Confirmation

CANCEL ORDER.TITLE: Cancel Order
CANCEL ORDER.DESCRIPTION: Do you really want to cancel the order? Your previous entries will be deleted.

DIY.TOUR WILL BE CREATED: One moment please. The tour is being generated.

ORDER ERRORS.MAXIMUM TOUR CONTINGENT DESC: Sorry, but you have reached your maximum contingent for tours. Please upgrade your account to increase your quota or contact your admin.
ORDER ERRORS.CONTRACT NOT ACTIVE OR VALID DESC: Sorry, but your contract has been cancelled or has expired.
ORDER ERRORS.UNKNOWN ERROR DESC: Unfortunately, this did not work. Please try again or contact our support.
ORDER ERRORS.UNKNOWN GENERAL ERROR: An error occurred during the order process. Please close the dialogue and start again.

SELECTION.DESCRIPTION: How do you want to create a virtual tour with Ogulo?

SELECTION.AUTOMATIC:
Send us your 360° panoramic photos and we'll create your tour.
